headline: Assessing ON Semiconductor (ON) Valuation After A Strong Multi‑Month Share Price Surge
summary: Recent performance snapshot ON Semiconductor (ON) has drawn investor attention after a period of strong share price moves, with the stock up about 36% over the past month and roughly 57% in the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for ON Semiconductor. Those moves sit within a strong run for investors, with the stock delivering a 99.49% year to date share price return and a 1 year total shareholder return of 158.01%, although the share price did fall 4.44% over the last day to US$113.11. If...

headline: One Lane Closed. The Whole Rate Picture Changed
summary: One shipping lane controls roughly 20 percent of the world's oil supply. Right now, it's closed. And in the space of five trading days, that single fact has moved oil to $105 a barrel, pushed Treasury yields to their highest point in roughly a year, and resurrected a rate hike scenario that nobody was pricing a week ago. Welcome to Monday.

headline: Lululemon takes battle with Chip Wilson public, calls founder 'misguided' and 'outdated'
summary: Lululemon responded publicly to founder Chip Wilson's campaign in a letter to shareholders, where it urged them to vote in its favor at its annual meeting.
